purpose: Pin the harness binary subcommand that exposes frankenlibc_membrane::runtime_math::clifford::certify_simd_string_operation(operation, candidate_isa, src_addr, dst_addr, len, overlap) -> CliffordIsomorphismCertificate as a standalone CLI. The lib API builds an algebraic equivalence certificate between a candidate SIMD string kernel implementation (avx2/sse4.2/neon/scalar) and the scalar reference using a Clifford-algebra grade decomposition: grade-0 (scalar) energy, grade-2 (bivector) energy, parity imbalance, and rotor norm deviation. Equivalence requires the candidate to be lane- and tail-contract compatible AND the controller to not observe an overlap/parity violation. Memcpy with `overlap=true` is always rejected (Pin parity witness forbids overlap). Previously reachable only from Rust callers; the CLI bridge lets CI validate per-ISA SIMD-string isomorphism certificates without compiling.
